cp_caplet_backend_kind_check.name: cp_caplet_backend_kind_check
cp_caplet_backend_kind_check.value: "caplets"."cp_caplet_backend"."kind" IN ('mcp','openapi','googleDiscovery','graphql','http','cli','caplets') AND (("caplets"."cp_caplet_backend"."kind" = 'caplets' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_backend"."child_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_backend"."kind" <> 'caplets' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_backend"."child_id" IS NULL))

cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check.name: cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check
cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check.value: ("caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" = 'local' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" = 'external' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NOT NULL)

cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check.name: cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check
cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check.value: ("caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'local' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'external' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'unresolved-setup' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NOT NULL)

cp_caplet_reference_target_check.name: cp_caplet_reference_target_check
cp_caplet_reference_target_check.value: ("caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'local' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'external' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'unresolved-setup' AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NOT NULL)

cp_host_setting_typed_value_check.name: cp_host_setting_typed_value_check
cp_host_setting_typed_value_check.value:
(
          (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'native.daemon-url'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'object'
            AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" ->> 'source' = 'setup'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'url') = 'string'
            AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" - ARRAY['source', 'url']::text[] = '{}'::jsonb
          )
          OR ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'telemetry' AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'boolean')
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" IN (
              'options.defaultSearchLimit',
              'options.exposureDiscoveryTimeoutMs',
              'options.completion.discoveryTimeoutMs',
              'options.completion.overallTimeoutMs'
            )
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'number'
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric = trunc(("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric)
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric > 0
          )
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.maxSearchLimit'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'number'
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric = trunc(("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric)
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric BETWEEN 1 AND 50
          )
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.exposureDiscoveryConcurrency'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'number'
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric = trunc(("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric)
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric BETWEEN 1 AND 32
          )
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" IN (
              'options.completion.cacheTtlMs',
              'options.completion.negativeCacheTtlMs'
            )
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'number'
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric = trunc(("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric)
            AND ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}')::numeric >= 0
          )
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.exposure'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'string'
            AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" #>> '{}' IN (
              'direct',
              'progressive',
              'code_mode',
              'direct_and_code_mode',
              'progressive_and_code_mode'
            )
          )
          OR (
            "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."key" = 'namespaceAliases'
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value") = 'object'
            AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" ? 'upstreams'
            AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" - ARRAY['local', 'upstreams']::text[] = '{}'::jsonb
            AND jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'upstreams') = 'object'
            AND (
              NOT ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" ? 'local')
              OR (
                jsonb_typeof("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'local') = 'string'
                AND "caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" ->> 'local' ~ '^[a-z]([a-z0-9-]{0,30}[a-z0-9])?$'
              )
            )
            AND NOT ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'upstreams') @? '$.keyvalue() ? (@.key like_regex "^\s*$")'
            AND NOT ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'upstreams') @? '$.* ? (@.type() != "string")'
            AND NOT ("caplets"."cp_host_setting"."value" -> 'upstreams') @? '$.* ? (!(@ like_regex "^[a-z]([a-z0-9-]{0,30}[a-z0-9])?$"))'
          )
        )

cp_key_canary_protection_check.name: cp_key_canary_protection_check
cp_key_canary_protection_check.value: ("caplets"."cp_key_canary"."protection" = 'aead' AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."nonce" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."ciphertext" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."auth_tag" IS NOT NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."verifier" IS NULL) OR ("caplets"."cp_key_canary"."protection" = 'hmac' AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."nonce" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."ciphertext" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."auth_tag" IS NULL AND "caplets"."cp_key_canary"."verifier" IS NOT NULL)
